nodes.norm_label: statsrouter (email sending, logging, photo-click tracking, stats admin)

nodes.norm_label: adminrouter (admin panel, login, config, links, galleries crud)

nodes.norm_label: linksservice (links.json crud, html generation, event banner)

nodes.norm_label: textutils (text loading, meta tag injection, schema.org json-ld)

nodes.norm_label: photoservice (photo listing with exif, gallery exclusion)

nodes.label: generate-placeholders script (blurred LQIP generation via sharp)
nodes.norm_label: generate-placeholders script (blurred lqip generation via sharp)

nodes.label: Contact form anti-abuse (rate-limit, honeypot, CSRF token, timestamp signature, origin check, spam keywords)
nodes.norm_label: contact form anti-abuse (rate-limit, honeypot, csrf token, timestamp signature, origin check, spam keywords)

nodes.label: EXIF date extraction (EXIF → filename pattern → file mtime fallback)
nodes.norm_label: exif date extraction (exif → filename pattern → file mtime fallback)

nodes.label: Config file precedence (CONFIG_FILE env → config.json → config.local.json → .example fallback)
nodes.norm_label: config file precedence (config_file env → config.json → config.local.json → .example fallback)

nodes.label: SSR first-images LCP optimization (server-renders first 4 gallery images, injects full photo data as JSON in page)
nodes.norm_label: ssr first-images lcp optimization (server-renders first 4 gallery images, injects full photo data as json in page)

nodes.label: CSS Pipeline (autoprefixer → csso → fingerprint → precompress)
nodes.rationale: Single source of truth src/input.css → autoprefixer → dist/css/output.css → csso minify + SHA256 fingerprint → .br/.gz precompressed + manifest.json + HTML ref update. Build order: build:css first, then build:assets which auto-updates all pages/*.html CSS references.

nodes.label: Cookie HMAC Admin Auth Pattern
nodes.rationale: Cookie HMAC token (adminAuth) + Express session. requireAdminSession / requireAdminPage middleware guards admin routes.

nodes.label: HMAC-Signed HD Image URLs
nodes.rationale: server/routes/signed-images.js generates HMAC-signed URLs for HD photo requests to protect high-resolution images from unauthorized access.

nodes.label: French Language Convention
nodes.rationale: All comments and UI text are in French across the entire codebase.

nodes.label: 7-Day FIFO Log Cleanup
nodes.rationale: Logs stored as JSONL files named YYYY-MM-DD.log. On startup and periodically (default every 24h), files older than 7 days are deleted. This implements a time-based FIFO retention policy.

nodes.label: Contact Form Anti-Spam Protections
nodes.rationale: Four-layered client-side anti-spam: (1) honeypot invisible field, (2) minimum 3-second fill time, (3) CSRF token via sessionStorage, (4) SHA-256 signature with secret key. Data sent to /send-mail for server-side verification.

nodes.label: Client-Side Photo Protection
nodes.rationale: Production-mode protections: disable right-click, block dev tools (F12, Ctrl+Shift+I/J/C), block save/print shortcuts, disable image dragging, overlay transparent spans over linked images to prevent direct save. Non-production mode only blocks image-specific context menus. Also includes console warning banners about copyright.

nodes.label: Animated Blobs Background Pattern
nodes.rationale: Shared design pattern across public pages (home, about_me, contact, mentions): 7 color-coded radial-gradient blobs with fixed positioning, pointer-move parallax animation, screen blend mode (dark) / multiply (light), reduced-motion support.

nodes.label: Admin Dark Theme Design System
nodes.rationale: Shared CSS custom properties across all admin pages: --bg #0f0f0f, --surface #1a1a1a, --border #2a2a2a, --text #e5e5e5, --accent #3b82f6, --danger #dc2626. Consistent card-based layout, sticky header with backdrop-blur, shared button styles (primary, ghost, danger).

nodes.label: Masonry.js + Fancybox Photo Gallery System
nodes.rationale: Main portfolio gallery uses Masonry.js for justified grid layout with imagesLoaded for progressive reveal. Fancybox v5 for lightbox with HD image swap via signed URL API. EXIF extraction disabled. Images resized via /photos/resize proxy. LCP-optimized with eager loading for first 4 images.

nodes.label: Shared Alpine.js Navbar Component
nodes.rationale: Repeated across home, about_me, contact, galleries, gallery pages: Alpine.js x-data='{open:false}' hamburger menu, Signika font, MATTIA PARRINELLO branding, links to /portfolio /galeries /a-propos /contact with hover underline animations.
